notes: One proposition is a near-verbatim copy of a canned accelerator template line; should trigger AG_TEMPLATE_OVERLAP.

propositions.text: We operate in a large and growing market with a proven team.
Our unique solution leverages cutting-edge AI to disrupt the industry at scale.
We have early traction with several design partners.
We are raising to accelerate growth and capture market share.

templates: Our unique solution leverages cutting-edge AI to disrupt the industry at scale.
We operate in a massive, rapidly expanding market with a world-class founding team.
